title: NEET UG 2026: Sikar Man Paid Rs 10 Lakh For Paper, Son Scored Only 107 Out Of 720 Marks
description: NEET UG 2026 Paper Leak: The CBI is also searching for Rishi Bival, son of accused Dinesh Bival, as he allegedly had access to the leaked question paper before the examination. Rishi does not appear to have cleared the test.
